sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: CNQ는 보통주 분기 현금배당 C$0.625를 공시했습니다.

keyPoints.text: CNQ는 배당 기준일 수정과 보통주 분기 현금배당을 함께 공시했습니다.

riskChanges.text: 위험요인 또는 공시 본문은 규제, 사업 운영, 계약 구조 관련 불확실성을 확인합니다.

businessChanges.text: 공시는 영업 실적보다 주주환원 일정과 배당 조건에 초점이 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 배당 유지가 원자재 가격과 현금흐름 흐름 속에서 지속되는지 확인해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a05112026dividendamendingaa.htm EX-99.1 Document AMENDING AND REPLACING – CANADIAN NATURAL RESOURCES LIMITED ANNOUNCES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND – MAY 7, 2026 CALGARY, ALBERTA – MAY 11, 2026 – FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE The dividend record date is being amended to the close of business on June 23, 2026 (instead of the close of business on June 19, 2026). This amendment concurrently pertains to the dividend record date noted in the press release entitled "Canadian Natural Resources Limited Announces 2026 First Quarter Results" dated May 7, 2026. The press release, as amended, reads: CANADIAN NATURAL RESOURCES LIMITED ANNOUNCES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND Canadian Natural Resources Limited announces that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend on its common shares of C$0.625 (sixty-two and one half cents). The dividend will be payable on July 7, 2026 to shareholders of record at  Normalized numeric aliases: $0.625 = 0.625달러.

VICTOR C. DAREL Chief Financial Officer LANCE J. CASSON Manager, Investor Relations Trading Symbol - CNQ Toronto Stock Exchange New York Stock Exchange Certain information regarding the Company contained herein may constitute forward-looking statements under applicable securities laws. Such statements are subject to known or unknown risks and uncertainties that may cause actual results to differ materially from those anticipated or implied in the forward-looking statements. The Company does not undertake to update forward-looking statements except as required by applicable securities laws. Refer to our website for detailed forward-looking statements and notes regarding 'Non-GAAP and Other Financial Measures' at www.cnrl.com.
